speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Yeh phenka hua tractor ka tyre dikh raha hai?
motion_prompt: Extreme close-up, handheld, slow push from tyre tread into the dark hollow centre; a sun-weathered hand grips the rim and flips the tyre toward the lens in one confident jerk. Harsh midday sun, hard shadow. No face.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Ismein har mahine saath hazaar rupaye chhupe hain.
motion_prompt: Medium close-up of Raju, eye-level with a slight low hero angle, static; warm three-quarter backlight, real-location feel; knowing half-smile, one eyebrow up, direct eye contact; he knuckle-taps the tyre.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Log mujhe kabaadi bolte the — kachra bech ke kya kar lega zindagi bhar.
motion_prompt: Handheld over-the-shoulder slow push, desaturated flashback look; bystanders smirk, one waves him off; his jaw tightens for a breath then firms again.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Par hisaab suno: ek scrap tyre ek sau bees rupaye ka. Thodi mehnat, sau keelein — aur yahi banta hai pashuon ka naand, bikta hai chhe sau se hazaar rupaye mein. Din ke paanch banao, mahine ke dedh sau. Khud jod lo.
motion_prompt: Top-down on a scrap-tyre pile with a snap zoom-out; macro inserts of a nail hammered and hands bending rubber; rupee value cards animate in on the beat. Raking side light so texture reads. Keep all numbers and text cards crisp.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Sochoge, shuru kahan se karun — badi machine chahiye? License? Main bhi ghanton YouTube par dhoondta raha — bas yahi galti kar di. Aadhi-adhuri videos, na process samajh aaya, na mandi ka.
motion_prompt: Wide, lonely night shot of Raju on a charpai lit only by blue-white phone glow from below, background near black; slow creeping zoom-in to medium close-up (the tunnel); insert of a thumb skipping half-watched clips; ends with him locking eyes with the lens.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Phir Seekho app mila. Usme Business Ideas category mein A se Z poora process — kaunsa tyre, scrap sasta kahan milega, kaise jodna hai, mandi mein kaise bechna hai. Koi badi-badi baatein nahi ki do crore kama lo — bas saaf kaam ki baat. Aur shuruaat sirf ek rupaye ke trial se.
motion_prompt: Match-cut to the same charpai in soft warm morning; Raju on a tripod, stable and calm, face evenly lit for the first time, a small genuine smile, counting points on his fingers; insert of the Seekho app Business Ideas screen zooming to the Rs 1 trial button.
overlay_text:
Seekho → Business Ideas
Sirf Rs 1 ka trial

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Pehla naand banaya padosi ke baade ke liye — chhe sau rupaye mile.
motion_prompt: Handheld traveling behind his shoulder to a neighbour's shed; close insert of cash notes pressed into his palm, held 1.5s; tilt up to his face; golden hour, warm rim, long shadows; a suppressed grin, shoulders drop an inch.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Teen mahine baad aaj Dundaraka mandi mein meri apni jagah hai, mahine ke saath-sattar hazaar. Maa ke liye pehli baar gehne liye. Ab log kabaadi nahi, kaarigar bolte hain. Kismat kharab nahi thi — direction galat thi.
motion_prompt: Rhythmic jump-cut montage, each cut a time-jump: high wide of a stall stacked with feed-troughs, cattle feeding, a slow push on the mother's hands receiving a gift tilting up to her glassy-eyed face, then Raju confident at his stall greeting a customer. Bright market daylight; mother in soft window light.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Tumhare aas-paas bhi kabaad pada hai — usmein business chhupa hai. To install button par click karo aur Seekho app download karo.
motion_prompt: Medium shot, slow zoom-out revealing the full stall — his empire in one frame; late golden hour, soft flare at the edge; Raju uncrosses his arms and points at the lens, warm but challenging, nods once and turns back to a customer; install UI slides up from the bottom third.
